title: Iceburg Reveals the Blueprints
description: Rob Lucci, Kaku, Kalifa, and Blueno are exposed as World Government agents, turning trusted Water Seven figures into enemies.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this part follows Iceburg, Nico Robin, Paulie, Chopper, Rob Lucci. Rob Lucci, Kaku, Kalifa, and Blueno are exposed as World Government agents, turning trusted Water Seven figures into enemies.

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: Also, if we had killed you then...

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: - to be on the safe side...

dialogue.speaker: Paulie
dialogue.text: Once they get the blueprint from Paulie,

dialogue.speaker: Paulie
dialogue.text: They will send you a signal.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Then, our mission will be complete,

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Maybe Nico Robin is in the crowd!

dialogue.speaker: Paulie
dialogue.text: Actually... this may be to our advantage.

dialogue.speaker: Kaku
dialogue.text: It's good if he got in,

summary: Rob Lucci, Kaku, Kalifa, and Blueno are exposed as World Government agents, turning trusted Water Seven figures into enemies.
